title: microseris laciniata subsp. leptosepala
intro: Microseris laciniata subsp. leptosepala, also known as narrow-leaf silverpuff or narrowleaf silverpuff, is a rare and endangered plant species native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microseris laciniata subsp. leptosepala include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions.
